_meta.description: This file contains the main introduction and personal information about the portfolio owner. It includes the professional intro paragraph, basic info (work status, location, authorizations), contact information (LinkedIn, GitHub, email, portfolio), current activities, recently concluded work, and a personal quote.

fields.intro_para: Main professional introduction paragraph - summarizes career goals, skills, and work ethic
fields.basic_info: Array of key professional status items (Work Status, Based In, Work Authorizations, Open to Relocation)
fields.contact_info: Contact links array with title and URL for LinkedIn, GitHub, Email, Portfolio Website
fields.currently: Current projects or work being actively pursued
fields.recently_concluded: Recent activities or projects that have concluded
fields.outer_para: Closing paragraph with call to action for collaboration
fields.my_quote: Personal quote that reflects the owner's mindset

about.intro_para: As an upcoming Software Engineer, I am passionate about building efficient and scalable solutions that measurably improve business outcomes, while also adopting a growth mindset and willingness to learn anything that makes me a better engineer. I have a proven track record of producing such improvements, both as an individual contributor and as a team collaborator. Due to my passion for my field, I have a strong work ethic which makes me a valuable asset to every team I join. I consistently strive toward perfection and always keep my codebase clean, readable, and modular. What I lack in experience, I make up in my industry-standard project work with a properly structured, modular codebase and well-documented repository

currently.text: Actively engineering Hive [1], a real-time topic based chatroom platform, building up on the shortcomings of other popular global conversation platforms. As of Feb'26, successfully handling 30+ users and 2000+ messages with $0 project cost [2]

Providing end-to-end engineering services on a project basis in every major tech areas like cross platform software development, system architecture designing, AI training & fine tuning, database management, hosting and maintenance services and software consultantions to name a few. Email me for more info

recently_concluded.text: Concluded my journey of sharpening my skills in the fields of Data Structures, Algorithms, System Architecture Design and Low Level Programming via online platforms like Leetcode and HelloInterview
Concluded the implementation of RaDAR [1], my own AI agent job hunting assistance tool

about.outer_para: I am always eager to collaborate on solving problems and contributing to the growth of a cause. Feel free to contact me via LinkedIn or email.
about.my_quote: Lets hope for the best and plan for the worst
